items.title: Effects of physical exercise on spasticity in people with multiple sclerosis: A systematic review.
items.summary: A systematic review analyzed the effectiveness of different physical exercise interventions on spasticity in people with multiple sclerosis, including randomized controlled trials with EDSS scores ≤6.0.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述明确了不同物理运动干预对多发性硬化症痉挛的影响。你可以参考综述结论，为 MS 患者的痉挛管理选择更有效的运动策略。
items.titleZh: 体育锻炼对多发性硬化症患者痉挛影响的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述分析了不同体育锻炼干预对多发性硬化症患者痉挛的影响，纳入了 EDSS 评分 ≤6.0 的随机对照试验。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review clarifies the effects of various physical exercise interventions on spasticity in multiple sclerosis. Refer to its conclusions to select more effective exercise strategies for managing spasticity in MS patients.
items.limitation: 由于研究设计异质性，本综述采用叙述性综合分析，未进行荟萃分析。
items.limitationEn: Due to heterogeneity in study designs, this review used narrative synthesis instead of meta-analysis.

items.title: Follow up to the 2018 IOC consensus statement on paediatric ACL injuries: towards a broader vision of care
items.summary: A follow-up to the 2018 IOC consensus statement on pediatric ACL injuries provides an updated vision of care, examining recent advances, current evidence, and persistent challenges in prevention, individualized management, evolving surgical strategies, and long-term holistic care.
items.curatedReason: 这份国际奥委会共识声明的后续报告，拓宽了儿童 ACL 损伤的护理视角。你需要更新对儿童 ACL 损伤预防、个体化管理和长期整体护理的理解，将其纳入你的临床实践考量。
items.titleZh: 2018 年国际奥委会儿童 ACL 损伤共识声明的后续：迈向更广阔的护理视野
items.summaryZh: 2018 年国际奥委会儿童 ACL 损伤共识声明的后续报告，提供了更新的护理愿景，审视了预防、个体化管理、不断发展的手术策略和长期整体护理方面的最新进展、现有证据和持续挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This follow-up to the IOC consensus statement broadens the perspective on pediatric ACL injury care. Update your understanding of pediatric ACL injury prevention, individualized management, and long-term holistic care, integrating these into your clinical practice considerations.

items.title: Prevalence of eating disorders and disordered eating in athletes: a systematic review and meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis estimated the prevalence of eating disorders and disordered eating among athletes across various training levels and assessment methods, identifying moderators associated with these prevalence estimates.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述明确了运动员饮食失调和紊乱性饮食的患病率及相关调节因素。这些发现是评估和识别高风险运动员的坚实依据，你应立即将其整合到你的筛查流程和干预策略中。
items.titleZh: 运动员饮食失调和紊乱性饮食的患病率：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析估计了不同训练水平和评估方法下运动员饮食失调和紊乱性饮食的患病率，并识别了与患病率估计相关的调节因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review clearly defines the prevalence of eating disorders and disordered eating among athletes, along with associated moderators. These findings provide a robust basis for assessing and identifying at-risk athletes, and you should immediately integrate them into your screening protocols and intervention strategies.
items.limitation: 由于不同研究的评估方法和训练水平存在异质性，可能影响患病率估计的精确性。
items.limitationEn: Heterogeneity in assessment methods and training levels across studies may affect the precision of prevalence estimates.

items.title: Subtype-specific optimal cut-off values of the Berg Balance Scale for predicting independent walking in inpatient stroke rehabilitation: a multicentre cohort study.
items.summary: A multicenter retrospective cohort study of 565 stroke patients determined the independent predictive value of admission Berg Balance Scale scores for independent walking at discharge and derived subtype-specific optimal cut-off values for ischemic and hemorrhagic stroke.
items.curatedReason: 入院时的 Berg 平衡量表评分确实是卒中患者出院时独立行走能力的有效预测指标。在对缺血性（56.5分）和出血性（54.5分）卒中患者进行评估时，可直接使用本研究提供的亚型特异性最佳截点值，这将极大提高你的预测精度。
items.titleZh: 住院卒中康复中 Berg 平衡量表预测独立行走能力的亚型特异性最佳截点值：一项多中心队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 565 名卒中患者的多中心回顾性队列研究确定了入院 Berg 平衡量表评分对出院时独立行走能力的独立预测价值，并推导了缺血性和出血性卒中亚型的最佳截点值。
items.curatedReasonEn: Admission Berg Balance Scale scores are indeed an effective predictor for independent walking ability at discharge in stroke patients. You can directly use the subtype-specific optimal cut-off values provided by this study—56.5 for ischemic and 54.5 for hemorrhagic stroke—to significantly improve your predictive accuracy during assessment.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性队列研究，可能存在数据收集偏差，且结果主要基于韩国人群，外推至其他人群需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: This retrospective cohort study may have data collection biases, and findings are primarily based on a Korean population, so generalization to other populations should be cautious.

items.title: Incidence of injury and illness at the Paris 2024 Paralympic Games: post-pandemic trends and sport-specific risks
items.summary: A prospective surveillance study at the Paris 2024 Paralympic Games monitored 4450 athletes, reporting 535 injuries (prevalence 10.9%) with an incidence of 8.6 per 1000 athlete days, identifying taekwondo (27.3) and football 5-a-side (22.3) as high-risk sports.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究描述了 2024 年巴黎残奥会伤病和疾病的流行病学特征。这能让你了解残疾运动员在高水平竞技中的伤病风险和模式，指导预防和干预策略。
items.titleZh: 2024 年巴黎残奥会伤病发生率：疫情后趋势和运动特异性风险
items.summaryZh: 一项在 2024 年巴黎残奥会进行的前瞻性监测研究，共监测 4450 名运动员，报告了 535 例伤病（患病率 10.9%），发生率为每千名运动员日 8.6，跆拳道（27.3）和五人制足球（22.3）被识别为高风险运动。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study describes the epidemiology of injuries and illnesses at the Paris 2024 Paralympic Games. Use this to understand injury risks and patterns in elite para-athletes, guiding prevention and intervention strategies.
items.limitation: 本研究为描述性流行病学，未能提供伤病与特定干预或预防措施之间的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This descriptive epidemiological study does not provide causal relationships between injuries/illnesses and specific interventions or preventive measures.

items.title: GaitEncoder: A Foundation Model of Gait Kinematics for Diverse Clinical Applications and Pathologies
items.summary: GaitEncoder is a generative foundation model of walking kinematics that integrates eight gait datasets (65,000+ recordings) to enable various downstream clinical tasks across diverse patient populations using smartphone video-based gait analysis.
items.curatedReason: GaitEncoder 模型旨在通过深度学习赋能步态运动学分析，支持临床决策。虽然仍是预印本，但该技术展示了将移动传感集成到康复实践中的潜力，值得你持续关注。
items.titleZh: GaitEncoder：一个用于多种临床应用和病理的步态运动学基础模型
items.summaryZh: GaitEncoder 是一个步态运动学生成式基础模型，它整合了八个步态数据集（超过 65,000 条记录），旨在通过基于智能手机视频的步态分析，支持多种临床应用和不同患者群体的下游任务。
items.curatedReasonEn: The GaitEncoder model aims to empower gait kinematics analysis through deep learning to support clinical decision-making. Though still a preprint, this technology demonstrates the potential for integrating mobile sensing into rehabilitation practice and warrants your continued attention.
items.limitation: 该研究为预印本，尚未经过同行评审，且模型在真实世界临床应用中的验证和推广仍需时间。
items.limitationEn: This study is a preprint and has not yet undergone peer review; model validation and implementation in real-world clinical applications will take time.

items.title: Exploration of lifestyle interventions for individuals with knee osteoarthritis: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified 36 studies (29 RCTs) on lifestyle interventions for knee osteoarthritis, exploring their range, characteristics, and outcomes, as well as the assessment measures used.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述梳理了膝骨关节炎生活方式干预的广度、特征及结果，并识别了评估中使用的结局测量指标。这能帮你掌握当前膝骨关节炎非药物干预的全景。
items.titleZh: 膝骨关节炎患者生活方式干预的探索性范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述识别了 36 项关于膝骨关节炎生活方式干预的研究（包括 29 项随机对照试验），探索了这些干预的范围、特征和结局，以及所使用的评估测量指标。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review provides an overview of the scope, characteristics, and outcomes of lifestyle interventions for knee OA, identifying key outcome measures. Use this to understand the current landscape of non-pharmacological interventions for knee OA.
items.limitation: 该综述纳入了多种研究设计，因此证据等级异质。
items.limitationEn: The review included various study designs, leading to heterogeneous evidence levels.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Physical therapy protocols for patients with a megaprosthesis after bone tumor resection.
items.summary: Physical therapy protocols for patients with megaprostheses after bone tumor resection were developed through an explorative literature search and consensus procedures involving orthopedic oncologic surgeons and physical therapists, focusing on six different megaprostheses.
items.curatedReason: 这份共识协议提供了骨肿瘤切除并大段假体置换术后患者的物理治疗方案。这为你处理这类复杂病例提供了结构化的实践框架。
items.titleZh: 骨肿瘤切除后大段假体置换患者的物理治疗方案
items.summaryZh: 通过探索性文献检索和骨科肿瘤外科医生及物理治疗师的共识程序，制定了骨肿瘤切除后大段假体置换患者的物理治疗方案，涵盖六种不同类型的大段假体。
items.curatedReasonEn: This consensus protocol offers structured physical therapy guidelines for patients post-bone tumor resection with megaprosthesis reconstruction. Use it to inform your management of these complex cases.
items.limitation: 共识协议基于专家意见和单中心初步实践。
items.limitationEn: The consensus protocol is based on expert opinions and initial single-center practice.

items.title: Effects of spatial and temporal pre-verbal prioritized instructions on spatiotemporal gait parameters in stroke patients: A within-subject repeated-measures study.
items.summary: In 27 stroke patients, a within-subject repeated-measures study investigated the effects of spatial and temporal pre-verbal prioritized instructions on spatiotemporal gait parameters compared to a no-prioritization condition.
items.curatedReason: 本研究提示，对于卒中患者，空间优先和时间优先的口头指令对步态参数有不同影响。在优化步态对称性时，你应考虑这两种指令的差异化应用，但鉴于样本量较小，还需更多研究验证。
items.titleZh: 空间和时间优先口头指令对卒中患者时空步态参数影响的研究
items.summaryZh: 一项自身对照重复测量研究在 27 名卒中患者中，比较了空间优先和时间优先的口头指令对时空步态参数的影响，并与无优先条件的步态进行对照。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study suggests that spatial and temporal prioritized verbal instructions differently affect gait parameters in stroke patients. When optimizing gait symmetry, consider the nuanced application of these two types of instructions, but given the small sample size, further validation is needed.
items.limitation: 研究设计为自身对照重复测量，且样本量较小（27例卒中患者），结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: The study design is a within-subject repeated-measures with a small sample size (27 stroke patients), limiting generalizability.

items.title: Feasibility of Integrating Music Therapy into Routine Speech-Language Rehabilitation for Post-Stroke Aphasia: A Real-World Outpatient Study.
items.summary: A quasi-experimental study investigated the feasibility of integrating a structured music therapy protocol into conventional speech-language therapy for post-stroke aphasia in an outpatient setting in Thailand.
items.curatedReason: 将音乐疗法整合到卒中失语症常规言语康复中是可行的，且本研究在泰国门诊环境中进行了初步探索。这为你的跨学科干预提供了方向，但仍处于可行性阶段，不应立即全面推广。
items.titleZh: 整合音乐疗法到卒中后失语症常规言语康复的可行性：一项真实世界门诊研究
items.summaryZh: 一项准实验研究在泰国门诊言语治疗诊所进行，旨在探讨将结构化音乐疗法方案整合到卒中后失语症常规言语-语言治疗中的可行性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Integrating music therapy into conventional speech-language therapy for post-stroke aphasia appears feasible, as explored in this preliminary study in a Thai outpatient setting. This offers a direction for your interdisciplinary interventions but is still in the feasibility stage and should not be broadly adopted yet.
items.limitation: 本研究为准实验设计，而非随机对照试验，且实验组增加了总体治疗接触时间，可能存在混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This quasi-experimental study, not an RCT, increased overall therapeutic contact time in the experimental group, which may introduce confounding factors.

items.title: Monitoring an athletes performance-state after they return to sport is a significant challenge in ACL injury research and applied practice
items.summary: Monitoring an athlete's performance state after returning to sport following an ACL injury remains a significant challenge in research and applied practice, despite extensive focus on return-to-sport testing.
items.curatedReason: 这篇文章指出，运动员 ACL 损伤后重返赛场后的表现状态监测是一个重要挑战。这提醒你在关注复训标准的同时，也要重视长期表现监测和风险管理。
items.titleZh: ACL 损伤运动员重返赛场后表现状态的监测是研究和实践中的一项重大挑战
items.summaryZh: 尽管重返赛场测试备受关注，但 ACL 损伤运动员在重返赛场后对其表现状态的监测在研究和实践中仍是一项重大挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article highlights that monitoring an athlete's performance state after returning to sport following an ACL injury is a significant challenge. This reminds you to prioritize long-term performance monitoring and risk management alongside return-to-training criteria.

items.title: Factors associated with return-to-sport outcomes following pathogen-confirmed acute respiratory infections in athletes: AWARE X study
items.summary: A prospective cohort study of 114 athletes with confirmed acute respiratory infections identified factors associated with return-to-sport outcomes, including median days to return-to-training (3.5 days), return-to-full-training (8 days), and return-to-full-performance (11 days).
items.curatedReason: 对于急性呼吸道感染的运动员，你现在有更具体的重返运动时间参考：中位数数据显示重返训练约 3.5 天，重返完全训练约 8 天，重返完全表现约 11 天。利用这些数据，可以为你的运动员提供更准确的预期管理和恢复计划。
items.titleZh: 运动员病原体确诊急性呼吸道感染后重返运动结局的相关因素：AWARE X 研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 114 名确诊急性呼吸道感染运动员的前瞻性队列研究，识别了与重返运动结局相关的因素，包括重返训练（中位数 3.5 天）、重返完全训练（8 天）和重返完全表现（11 天）的时间。
items.curatedReasonEn: For athletes with acute respiratory infections, you now have more specific return-to-sport timelines: median data suggests return-to-training around 3.5 days, return-to-full-training around 8 days, and return-to-full-performance around 11 days. Use these numbers to provide more accurate expectation management and recovery planning for your athletes.
items.limitation: 本研究样本量为 114 例急性呼吸道感染病例，结果可能受特定病原体和疾病严重程度分布影响。
items.limitationEn: With a sample size of 114 acute respiratory infection cases, the results may be influenced by the distribution of specific pathogens and illness severity.

items.title: Physiotherapists' knowledge, attitude and practice of motor learning in stroke rehabilitation.
items.summary: A survey of 40 South African physiotherapists described their knowledge, attitudes, and practices regarding motor learning in stroke rehabilitation, utilizing convenient and snowball sampling techniques.
items.curatedReason: 这项调查反映了南非物理治疗师在卒中康复中对运动学习的知识、态度和实践情况。这能让你了解不同区域的临床实践现状。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗师在卒中康复中运动学习的知识、态度和实践
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 40 名南非物理治疗师的调查描述了他们在卒中康复中关于运动学习的知识、态度和实践，该调查采用了便利抽样和滚雪球抽样技术。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey details South African physiotherapists' knowledge, attitudes, and practices regarding motor learning in stroke rehabilitation. Use it to understand regional variations in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为小样本横断面调查，仅代表南非部分物理治疗师的观点，外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a small-sample, cross-sectional survey representing only a subset of South African physiotherapists, limiting generalizability.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: The effectiveness of cardiovascular rehabilitation for transient ischaemic attack and mild stroke: A randomised controlled trial.
items.summary: This RCT (n=140) found that a 6-week cardiovascular rehabilitation program significantly improved functional exercise capacity (6MWTD, moderate effect size) and physical activity levels over 6 months in TIA and mild stroke patients compared to usual care.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 证据表明，针对短暂性脑缺血发作 (TIA) 和轻度卒中患者的综合心血管康复，在 6 个月内能显著改善功能性运动能力、身体活动水平。这是你将这类患者纳入心血管康复计划的有力支持。
items.titleZh: 心血管康复对短暂性脑缺血发作和轻度卒中患者的有效性：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验（n=140）发现，与常规治疗相比，针对短暂性脑缺血发作和轻度卒中患者的为期 6 周心血管康复计划，在 6 个月内能显著改善功能性运动能力（6MWTD，中等效应量）和身体活动水平。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT evidence indicates that integrated cardiovascular rehabilitation for patients with TIA and mild stroke significantly improves functional exercise capacity and physical activity levels over 6 months. This strongly supports including such patients in cardiovascular rehabilitation programs.
items.limitation: 试验随访期为 6 个月，长期效果尚需进一步研究。
items.limitationEn: The trial's follow-up period is 6 months; longer-term effects require further study.

items.title: The psychosocial impacts of having eating and drinking difficulties after stroke: a qualitative evidence synthesis.
items.summary: This systematic qualitative evidence synthesis (22 studies, 645 informants) explored the psychosocial impacts of eating and drinking difficulties after stroke from the perspectives of stroke survivors, informal carers, and healthcare professionals, identifying significant psychological and social domains.
items.curatedReason: 卒中后吞咽和进食困难远不止生理问题，还会严重影响患者的心理健康和社会参与。在康复计划中，你要充分关注这些社会心理影响，提供全面的支持，而非仅关注吞咽机制。
items.titleZh: 卒中后吞咽和进食困难的社会心理影响：一项定性证据综合
items.summaryZh: 这项系统定性证据综合（纳入 22 项研究，645 名受访者）从卒中幸存者、非正式照护者和医疗专业人员的角度，探讨了卒中后吞咽和进食困难的社会心理影响，确定了显著的心理和社会影响领域。
items.curatedReasonEn: Eating and drinking difficulties after stroke go beyond physical problems; they also severely affect patients' psychological well-being and social participation. In rehabilitation plans, you should fully address these psychosocial impacts and provide comprehensive support, not just focus on swallowing mechanisms.
items.limitation: 作为定性证据综合，结果高度依赖于所纳入研究的质量和解释框架。
items.limitationEn: As a qualitative evidence synthesis, the results are highly dependent on the quality and interpretive framework of the included studies.

items.title: Sarcopenia Increases Adjacent Segment Degeneration Risk within 3 Years of Anterior Cervical Discectomy and Fusion.
items.summary: This retrospective cohort study of 333 ACDF patients found that sarcopenia significantly increases the risk of radiographic adjacent segment degeneration within 3 years post-surgery.
items.curatedReason: 肌少症会增加前路颈椎间盘切除融合术 (ACDF) 术后 3 年内邻近节段退变的风险。在 ACDF 术前评估中，你应考虑筛查患者是否存在肌少症，并将其视为术后康复计划中的一个关键风险因素，提早进行干预。
items.titleZh: 肌少症增加前路颈椎间盘切除融合术后 3 年内邻近节段退变风险
items.summaryZh: 这项对 333 名前路颈椎间盘切除融合术 (ACDF) 患者的回顾性队列研究发现，肌少症显著增加了术后 3 年内影像学邻近节段退变的风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: Sarcopenia increases the risk of adjacent segment degeneration within 3 years following Anterior Cervical Discectomy and Fusion (ACDF). In pre-ACDF assessments, you should consider screening for sarcopenia and treat it as a critical risk factor in the post-operative rehabilitation plan, intervening early.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性队列研究，可能存在混杂因素和信息偏差。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective cohort study, which may have confounding factors and information bias.

items.title: Multi-Domain Benefits of Exergaming for Sarcopenia Management in Institutionalized Older Adults: Physical, Psychological, and Social Outcomes.
items.summary: This quasi-experimental study (n=72) found that a 12-week exergaming intervention (Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure) significantly improved physical, psychological, and social outcomes in institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia compared to a control group.
items.curatedReason: 为期 12 周的体感游戏干预（如 Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure）对机构养老的老年肌少症患者在身体、心理和社会方面均有显著益处。这项研究提供了明确的证据，支持你在老年康复中应用体感游戏作为综合干预手段。
items.titleZh: 体感游戏对机构养老肌少症老年人多领域益处：身体、心理和社会结局
items.summaryZh: 这项准实验研究（n=72）发现，为期 12 周的体感游戏干预（Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure）在身体、心理和社会结局方面显著改善了机构养老的肌少症老年人，优于对照组。
items.curatedReasonEn: A 12-week exergaming intervention (e.g., Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure) significantly benefits institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia across physical, psychological, and social domains. This study provides clear evidence supporting your use of exergaming as a comprehensive intervention in geriatric rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 这是一项准实验研究，虽然有对照组，但非随机分配，可能存在选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This is a quasi-experimental study; although it has a comparison group, it's not randomized, which may introduce selection bias.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: In safe hands - patients with knee and hip osteoarthritis expectations and experience of physical therapist-led triage in a secondary care setting.
items.summary: This qualitative study explored the expectations and experiences of 85 patients with hip or knee OA regarding PT-led triage in a Swedish orthopedic clinic, finding generally positive perceptions but also areas for improvement in patient participation and expectation fulfillment.
items.curatedReason: PT 主导的分诊模式在瑞典骨科诊所获得了患者的良好反馈，主要集中在知情权和评估期望的满足度上。这提示你在推行类似模式时，需在患者沟通中重点关注这两个维度。
items.titleZh: 膝髋骨关节炎患者对物理治疗师主导的二级诊疗分诊的期望与体验
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究探讨了瑞典骨科诊所 85 名膝髋骨关节炎患者对物理治疗师主导分诊的期望和体验，发现患者普遍评价良好，但在知情权和评估期望满足度方面仍有提升空间。
items.curatedReasonEn: PT-led triage in a Swedish orthopedic clinic received good patient feedback, particularly regarding shared decision-making and fulfillment of assessment expectations. This suggests that when implementing similar models, you should prioritize these aspects in patient communication.
items.limitation: 这是一项探索性定性研究，样本量小，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This is an exploratory qualitative study with a small sample size, limiting the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Physical Activity in Women With Obesity: Fatigue, Knee Symptoms, and Functional Capacity.
items.summary: This cross-sectional study of 85 women with obesity investigated the associations between functional capacity, musculoskeletal symptoms, and perceived barriers with total physical activity level, finding that these domains are concurrently associated with lower physical activity.
items.curatedReason: 该研究强调了肥胖女性在身体活动中面临的疲劳、膝关节症状和功能能力受限的复杂关联。在评估和干预这类患者时，你需要综合考虑这些因素，采取多维度康复策略。
items.titleZh: 肥胖女性的身体活动：疲劳、膝关节症状与功能能力
items.summaryZh: 这项对 85 名肥胖女性的横断面研究调查了功能能力、肌肉骨骼症状和感知障碍与总体身体活动水平的关联，发现这些领域与较低的身体活动水平存在并发关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study highlights the complex associations of fatigue, knee symptoms, and functional limitations with physical activity in women with obesity. When assessing and intervening with these patients, you need to consider these factors comprehensively and adopt multi-dimensional rehabilitation strategies.
items.limitation: 这是一项横断面研究，无法建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional study, so it cannot establish causality.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Impact of lower limb proprioception on balance and gait in hemiparetic patients: biomechanical analysis.
items.summary: This study investigated associations between lower extremity proprioceptive impairments (foot sole sensation, position sense, and kinesthesia) and objective balance/gait parameters in hemiparetic individuals, characterizing the specific relationships.
items.curatedReason: 脑卒中偏瘫患者的本体感觉障碍，特别是足底感觉、位置觉和运动觉，与平衡和步态异常有明确关联。你在临床评估时，应更精细地评估这些本体感觉要素，并将其纳入康复训练目标。
items.titleZh: 偏瘫患者下肢本体感觉对平衡和步态的影响：生物力学分析
items.summaryZh: 本研究调查了偏瘫患者下肢本体感觉障碍（足底感觉、位置觉和运动觉）与平衡及步态客观参数之间的关联，明确了其具体关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: Proprioceptive deficits in hemiparetic stroke patients, particularly foot sole sensation, position sense, and kinesthesia, are clearly associated with balance and gait abnormalities. In clinical assessment, you should evaluate these proprioceptive elements more finely and incorporate them into rehabilitation goals.
items.limitation: 研究设计为观察性研究，无法建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: The study design is observational, so it cannot establish causality.

items.title: Feasibility of applying the Cognitive Orientation to daily Occupational Performance (CO-OP) approach in a Danish municipal neurorehabilitation context.
items.summary: This feasibility study examined the application of the Cognitive Orientation to daily Occupational Performance (CO-OP) approach in home-living stroke survivors (aged ≥45, MoCA ≥20) within a Danish municipal neurorehabilitation center, focusing on recruitment, dose, fidelity, and perceived value.
items.curatedReason: CO-OP 方法（认知导向的日常职业表现）在丹麦市政神经康复环境中应用于卒中幸存者的可行性研究表明了积极的结果。你可以考虑将这一聚焦解决问题和策略使用的方法引入你的实践。
items.titleZh: 认知导向日常职业表现 (CO-OP) 方法在丹麦市政神经康复环境中应用于卒中幸存者的可行性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项可行性研究考察了认知导向日常职业表现 (CO-OP) 方法在丹麦市政神经康复中心对居家卒中幸存者（年龄≥45岁，MoCA≥20分）的应用情况，重点关注招募、剂量、依从性和感知价值。
items.curatedReasonEn: A feasibility study on applying the Cognitive Orientation to daily Occupational Performance (CO-OP) approach to stroke survivors in a Danish municipal neurorehabilitation context shows positive results. You may consider incorporating this problem-solving and strategy-focused method into your practice.
items.limitation: 这是一项单组前测后测的可行性研究，缺乏对照组，无法评估干预的实际疗效。
items.limitationEn: This is a single-group pretest-posttest feasibility study, lacking a control group, thus unable to assess the actual efficacy of the intervention.

items.title: "Most inactive in my life": patient-reported barriers to cardiac rehabilitation in heart failure.
items.summary: This qualitative study, using in-depth interviews with 22 heart failure patients, identified patient-reported barriers and facilitators to cardiac rehabilitation participation, including depressive symptoms and perceived stress.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究揭示了心力衰竭患者参与心脏康复的常见障碍（如抑郁症状和感知压力）。你在推广和实施心脏康复计划时，应主动识别并解决这些患者报告的心理和社会障碍，而不是只关注生理指标。
items.titleZh: “我一生中最不活跃的时候”：心力衰竭患者报告的心脏康复障碍
items.summaryZh: 这项对 22 名心力衰竭患者进行深度访谈的定性研究，确定了患者报告的心脏康复参与障碍和促进因素，包括抑郁症状和感知压力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study reveals common barriers to cardiac rehabilitation participation for heart failure patients (e.g., depressive symptoms and perceived stress). When promoting and implementing cardiac rehabilitation programs, you should actively identify and address these patient-reported psychological and social barriers, rather than focusing solely on physiological indicators.
items.limitation: 作为定性研究，样本量较小（22名），结果的普适性有限。
items.limitationEn: As a qualitative study, the sample size is small (22 participants), limiting the generalizability of the findings.

items.title: Enhanced Gait Variability Index in Neurological and Geriatric Rehabilitation: A Scoping Review.
items.summary: This scoping review aimed to characterize the populations, clinical contexts, assessment protocol heterogeneity, and methodological gaps in the application of the Enhanced Gait Variability Index (eGVI) in neurological and geriatric rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 增强步态变异指数 (eGVI) 作为评估神经和老年人群跌倒风险和活动障碍的综合指标前景良好。目前证据尚不成熟，但你可关注其在临床实践中的进一步验证和标准化。
items.titleZh: 增强步态变异指数在神经和老年康复中的应用：范围综述
items.summaryZh: 这项范围综述旨在描述增强步态变异指数 (eGVI) 在神经和老年康复中应用的人群、临床背景、评估方案异质性以及方法学空白。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Enhanced Gait Variability Index (eGVI) shows promise as a composite measure for assessing fall risk and mobility impairment in neurological and geriatric populations. The current evidence is not yet mature, but you can monitor its further validation and standardization in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 作为范围综述，主要侧重于文献映射而非效果评估，无法提供干预的直接证据。
items.limitationEn: As a scoping review, it primarily focuses on mapping literature rather than evaluating effects, so it cannot provide direct evidence for interventions.

items.title: Sudden cardiac arrest preparedness in African football: evidence from Cameroon and implications for global sport
items.summary: This cross-sectional survey assessed the knowledge, attitudes, and practices of professional football stakeholders in Cameroon regarding sudden cardiac arrest preparedness, identifying system-level gaps in low-resource sport settings.
items.curatedReason: 这项在非洲足球运动员中进行的调查揭示了运动性猝死应急准备的知识、态度和实践中的系统性不足。这提醒你在评估和管理运动员时，需要更关注紧急医疗预案，尤其是在资源受限的环境中。
items.titleZh: 非洲足球运动性猝死应急准备：喀麦隆的证据及对全球体育的影响
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面调查评估了喀麦隆职业足球利益相关者对运动性猝死应急准备的知识、态度和实践，识别了资源匮乏体育环境中的系统性缺陷。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey in African football players reveals systemic deficiencies in knowledge, attitudes, and practices regarding sudden cardiac arrest preparedness. This reminds you to pay more attention to emergency medical plans when evaluating and managing athletes, especially in resource-limited settings.
items.limitation: 这是一项横断面调查研究，无法确定因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional survey, so it cannot establish causality.

items.title: Trends in Intrinsic Capacity: Evidence from 32 Countries
items.summary: This study aimed to investigate changes and temporal trends in intrinsic capacity across a broad range of 32 countries, providing insight into healthy aging.
items.curatedReason: 内在能力 (Intrinsic Capacity) 的趋势研究提供了全球范围内健康老龄化的重要视角。你可以利用这些数据来理解不同国家老龄人群的健康状况，并调整你的老年康复策略以应对区域性挑战。
items.titleZh: 内在能力趋势：来自 32 个国家的证据
items.summaryZh: 这项研究旨在调查 32 个国家内在能力的变化和时间趋势，为健康老龄化提供洞见。
items.curatedReasonEn: Trends in Intrinsic Capacity research offer an important global perspective on healthy aging. You can use this data to understand the health status of aging populations in different countries and adapt your geriatric rehabilitation strategies to address regional challenges.
items.limitation: 研究未明确具体研究设计，但通常这类跨国趋势分析可能受数据来源和衡量标准差异的影响。
items.limitationEn: The specific study design is not clearly stated, but such cross-country trend analyses can often be affected by differences in data sources and measurement standards.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Utilization of physiotherapy services and associated factors among stroke survivors attending hospitals in Gondar Town, Northwest Ethiopia.
items.summary: This cross-sectional study in Northwest Ethiopia assessed physiotherapy service utilization and associated factors among stroke survivors (sample size not specified), identifying various demographic and clinical factors influencing access.
items.curatedReason: 这项来自埃塞俄比亚的研究揭示了卒中幸存者物理治疗服务利用率及其相关因素。你可以参考这类区域性研究，思考在你的执业环境中，哪些因素可能影响患者的康复依从性，并尝试解决。
items.titleZh: 埃塞俄比亚西北部贡德尔镇卒中幸存者物理治疗服务利用率及相关因素
items.summaryZh: 这项在埃塞俄比亚西北部的横断面研究评估了卒中幸存者（样本量未说明）物理治疗服务的利用率及相关因素，并确定了影响服务的各种人口统计学和临床因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study from Ethiopia reveals the utilization of physiotherapy services and associated factors among stroke survivors. You can refer to such regional studies to consider what factors might influence patient adherence to rehabilitation in your practice environment and try to address them.
items.limitation: 这是一项横断面研究，不能确定因果关系，且结果的地域特异性较强，外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional study, so it cannot establish causality, and the results are highly geographically specific, limiting generalizability.

items.title: Patient Engagement, Clinical Outcomes, and Satisfaction of an Advanced Orthopedic Virtual Physical Therapy Model: A Retrospective Cohort Study.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study found that an advanced orthopedic virtual physical therapy model achieved a 70.9% care episode completion rate (n=61/86), exceeding the national benchmark of 43%, and 96% of completers achieved Minimal Clinically Important Differences.
items.curatedReason: 远程物理治疗已超越常规，本研究表明高级虚拟 PT 模型在骨科患者中的完成率（71%）显著高于全国基准（43%），且 96% 的患者达到了最小临床重要差异。这意味着你可以考虑扩展远程医疗服务，将其作为提升患者依从性和疗效的关键工具。
items.titleZh: 高级骨科虚拟物理治疗模型的患者依从性、临床结局和满意度：一项回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究显示，高级骨科虚拟物理治疗模型的依从性高，70.9% 的患者完成了完整治疗，高于全国基准（43%），且 96% 的完成者达到了最小临床重要差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Virtual physical therapy has evolved. This study shows an advanced orthopedic virtual PT model achieved a 71% completion rate, significantly exceeding the national benchmark of 43%, with 96% of patients achieving Minimal Clinically Important Differences. Consider expanding your telehealth services as a key tool to improve patient adherence and outcomes.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性队列研究，非随机设计限制了其在因果推断方面的强度。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective cohort study, and its non-randomized design limits the strength of causal inferences.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Preoperative physiotherapy and one-year patient-reported outcomes after primary total knee arthroplasty: a registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients.
items.summary: A registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients found that preoperative physiotherapy was associated with improved KOOS-PS and pain scores at 2 months and 1 year after primary total knee arthroplasty, compared to no preoperative physiotherapy.
items.curatedReason: 这项大型注册研究显示术前物理治疗与全膝关节置换术后患者报告结局（PROMs）的改善相关。这为你在临床实践中推行术前康复提供了有力的数据支持，强调了早期干预对长期恢复的重要性。
items.titleZh: 术前物理治疗与初次全膝关节置换术后一年患者报告结局：一项涉及 1,688 名患者的注册队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项基于注册数据的队列研究对 1,688 名患者进行分析，发现接受术前物理治疗的患者在初次全膝关节置换术后 2 个月和 1 年的 KOOS-PS 和疼痛评分均有改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: This large registry-based study indicates that preoperative physiotherapy is associated with improved patient-reported outcomes (PROMs) after total knee arthroplasty. This provides strong data support for advocating preoperative rehabilitation in your clinical practice, emphasizing the importance of early intervention for long-term recovery.
items.limitation: 作为一项注册研究，可能存在混杂因素，且患者分组（有无术前物理治疗）并非随机，这限制了因果关系的确定性。
items.limitationEn: As a registry-based study, confounding factors may exist, and patient grouping (with or without preoperative physiotherapy) was not randomized, limiting the certainty of causality.

items.title: Short-term effects of therapeutic massage alone or combined with conventional physiotherapy in myofascial pain syndrome: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (n=60) found that therapeutic massage alone or combined with conventional physiotherapy yielded short-term improvements in pain, pressure pain threshold, muscle activity, functional disability, and quality of life in individuals with chronic myofascial pain syndrome compared to conventional physiotherapy alone.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 提供了肌筋膜疼痛综合征中治疗性按摩的短期效果证据。结果提示，单独的治疗性按摩与结合常规物理治疗可能对改善疼痛、压力痛阈、功能障碍和生活质量有益。在实践中，你可以考虑将按摩作为辅助手段，或与常规治疗结合，以优化患者结局。
items.titleZh: 治疗性按摩单独或联合常规物理治疗对肌筋膜疼痛综合征的短期效果：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（n=60）发现，在慢性肌筋膜疼痛综合征患者中，单独的治疗性按摩或结合常规物理治疗，在疼痛、压力痛阈、肌肉活动、功能障碍和生活质量方面均显示出短期改善，优于单独常规物理治疗组。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT provides evidence for the short-term effects of therapeutic massage in myofascial pain syndrome. The results suggest that therapeutic massage alone or combined with conventional physiotherapy may benefit pain, pressure pain threshold, functional disability, and quality of life. In practice, you might consider massage as an adjunct or in combination with conventional treatments to optimize patient outcomes.
items.limitation: 研究的随访时间较短，仅评估了短期效果，长期效果仍需更多研究证实。
items.limitationEn: The follow-up period of the study is short, only evaluating short-term effects, and long-term effects require further research.

items.title: The WalkBack (walking and education) program for prevention of low back pain is acceptable to physiotherapists but relies on training, flexibility and system-level enablers to optimise implementation: a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored physiotherapists' perceived barriers and facilitators to adopting the WalkBack program (walking and education for low back pain prevention), highlighting that successful implementation relies on training, flexibility, and system-level enablers.
items.curatedReason: WalkBack 项目在预防复发性下腰痛方面的可行性研究，强调了实施预防性项目需要培训、灵活性和系统层面的支持。这表明，如果你想在诊所推广预防性干预，除了方案本身，还需重视配套培训和流程优化。
items.titleZh: 用于预防下腰痛的 WalkBack（步行和教育）项目：物理治疗师认为其可接受，但优化实施依赖于培训、灵活性和系统级支持：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了物理治疗师对 WalkBack 项目（预防下腰痛的步行和教育计划）在常规实践中采用的感知障碍和促进因素，强调其成功实施依赖于培训、灵活性和系统层面的支持。
items.curatedReasonEn: The feasibility study of the WalkBack program for preventing recurrent low back pain highlights that implementing preventive programs requires training, flexibility, and system-level support. This suggests that if you aim to promote preventive interventions in your clinic, you must prioritize supporting training and process optimization in addition to the program itself.
items.limitation: 这是一项定性研究，主要关注感知障碍和促进因素，不直接评估 WalkBack 项目的临床效果。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study, primarily focusing on perceived barriers and facilitators, not directly evaluating the clinical effectiveness of the WalkBack program.

items.title: Profile of patients attending private vestibular physiotherapy clinics in Spain: A cross-sectional study.
items.summary: A multicenter cross-sectional study surveyed Spanish vestibular physiotherapists and their patients to characterize the demographic, clinical, and healthcare utilization profiles of patients attending private vestibular physiotherapy clinics.
items.curatedReason: 西班牙前庭物理治疗患者的横断面数据提示，多数患者为中年女性，平均等待时间达6个月。如果你在西班牙执业，或考虑类似市场，应关注这种潜在的治疗延迟和服务缺口。
items.titleZh: 西班牙私人前庭物理治疗诊所患者概况：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项多中心横断面研究调查了西班牙前庭物理治疗师及其患者，以描述私人前庭物理治疗诊所患者的人口学、临床和医疗利用特征。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional data from Spain suggests vestibular physiotherapy patients are predominantly middle-aged women, with an average wait time of 6 months. If you practice in Spain or are considering similar markets, be mindful of this potential treatment delay and service gap.
items.limitation: 这是一项横断面研究，不能揭示因果关系，且数据主要来自私人诊所的自我报告，可能存在选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional study and cannot establish causality. Data are primarily self-reported from private clinics, which may introduce selection bias.

items.title: Triceps Surae Neuromuscular Activity During Single-leg Jumping Tasks in Individuals After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction.
items.summary: This study compared triceps surae electromyographic (EMG) activity during single-leg jumping tasks between individuals after anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction (ACLR) and healthy controls, finding lower EMG activity in ACLR patients, with bilateral differences within the ACLR group.
items.curatedReason: ACL 重建术后患者在单腿跳跃任务中比健康对照组表现出更低的腓肠肌肌电活动，且患肢与健肢之间也存在差异。这提示你在康复训练中应特别关注腓肠肌的激活和力量训练，以优化重返运动的决策。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后个体单腿跳跃任务中腓肠肌神经肌肉活动
items.summaryZh: 这项研究比较了前交叉韧带重建术后个体与健康对照组在单腿跳跃任务中腓肠肌的肌电活动，发现在 ACLR 患者中肌电活动较低，且 ACLR 组内部患肢与健肢之间存在双侧差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Individuals post-ACLR showed lower triceps surae EMG activity during single-leg jumping tasks compared to healthy controls, with differences also observed between the involved and uninvolved limbs. This suggests you should specifically focus on triceps surae activation and strength training in rehabilitation to optimize return-to-sport decisions.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小，且仅关注特定肌肉群的肌电活动，未全面评估膝关节生物力学。
items.limitationEn: The study has a relatively small sample size and focuses only on EMG activity of specific muscle groups, without comprehensively evaluating knee joint biomechanics.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Eight weeks of visual perturbation training effects on unanticipated cutting lower-limb biomechanics and errors in male athletes following anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction: a randomized controlled clinical trial (RCT).
items.summary: An 8-week randomized controlled clinical trial (n=24 ACLR male athletes) demonstrated that visual perturbation training improved unanticipated cutting lower-limb biomechanics and reduced errors compared to control, addressing neuromuscular deficits post-ACLR.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 证实了视觉扰动训练能改善 ACLR 术后运动员在非预期变向任务中的下肢生物力学和错误。这意味着你可以在重返运动训练中加入此类认知运动双重任务，以解决 ACL 损伤后的神经肌肉控制缺陷，降低再损伤风险。
items.titleZh: 8 周视觉扰动训练对前交叉韧带重建术后男性运动员非预期变向时下肢生物力学和错误的影响：一项随机对照临床试验（RCT）
items.summaryZh: 一项为期 8 周的随机对照临床试验（n=24 名 ACLR 术后男性运动员）显示，视觉扰动训练改善了非预期变向时下肢生物力学并减少了错误，有效解决了 ACLR 术后的神经肌肉缺陷。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT confirms that visual perturbation training improves lower-limb biomechanics and errors during unanticipated cutting maneuvers in athletes after ACLR. This means you can incorporate such cognitive-motor dual tasks into return-to-sport training to address neuromuscular control deficits post-ACL injury and reduce re-injury risk.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（24名男性运动员），结果的普适性需谨慎推断至女性患者或不同运动水平群体。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size (24 male athletes), and the generalizability of the results to female patients or different athletic levels should be considered cautiously.

items.title: Mindset, Effort, and Support-the foundation for patients' decision to return to sport after an anterior cruciate ligament injury. A qualitative analysis from the NACOX Cohort.
items.summary: A qualitative analysis of 112 patients from the NACOX Cohort identified three key categories—"motivation and driving forces," "treatment and recovery," and "medical clearance and readiness"—as determinants for returning to sport after an ACL injury.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究揭示了患者在 ACL 损伤后决定重返运动的关键因素，包括心态、努力和支持。这提醒你在康复过程中，除了关注生理恢复，还应积极支持患者的心理建设和提供多方面支持，以促进更成功的重返运动决策。
items.titleZh: 心态、努力和支持——ACL 损伤患者重返运动决策的基础：一项来自 NACOX 队列的定性分析
items.summaryZh: 来自 NACOX 队列的 112 名患者的定性分析确定了“动机和驱动力”、“治疗和恢复”以及“医学许可和准备状态”是 ACL 损伤后重返运动决策的三个关键决定因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study reveals key factors influencing patients' decisions to return to sport (RTS) after an ACL injury, including mindset, effort, and support. This highlights the importance of actively supporting patients' psychological well-being and providing multifaceted support during rehabilitation, in addition to physiological recovery, to promote more successful RTS decisions.
items.limitation: 这是一项定性研究，通过自由文本问题收集数据，结果的解释受限于患者自我报告的内容，且样本量相对较小。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study, collecting data through free-text questions, and the interpretation of results is limited by self-reported patient content, with a relatively small sample size.
items.journal: Physical therapy in sport : official journal of the Association of Chartered Physiotherapists in Sports Medicine

items.title: Factors Affecting Clinical Decision Making for Blood Flow Restriction Training in Pediatric and Adolescent Patients Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury.
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey study described how patient clinical presentation influences physical therapists' decision-making for blood flow restriction training (BFRT) in pediatric and adolescent patients following anterior cruciate ligament injury.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对物理治疗师的调查揭示了血流限制训练（BFRT）在儿童和青少年 ACL 损伤患者中的临床决策影响因素。这表明，如果你考虑将 BFRT 用于这类患者，需要权衡其临床表现、证据 Concordance 和安全指南。
items.titleZh: 影响前交叉韧带损伤后儿童和青少年患者血流限制训练临床决策的因素
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面调查研究描述了患者临床表现如何影响物理治疗师对前交叉韧带损伤后儿童和青少年患者进行血流限制训练（BFRT）的临床决策。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey of physical therapists reveals factors influencing clinical decisions for blood flow restriction training (BFRT) in pediatric and adolescent ACL injury patients. This suggests that if you consider using BFRT for this population, you need to weigh clinical presentation, evidence concordance, and safety guidelines.
items.limitation: 这是一项横断面调查研究，依赖于物理治疗师的自我报告，可能存在回忆偏倚和报告偏差。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional survey study, relying on self-reported data from physical therapists, which may introduce recall bias and reporting bias.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: The Perspective and Needs of Older Adults With Osteoporosis With a Recent Upper Extremity Fragility Fracture Concerning Fall Risk and Fear of Falling.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored the perspectives of older adults with osteoporosis and upper extremity fragility fractures, focusing on their health concerns, the impact of falls and fear of falling on daily life, and views on rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 别只盯着骨折。这项定性研究强调，骨质疏松合并上肢脆性骨折的老年患者最担忧的往往是再次跌倒和随之而来的功能丧失。在康复中，你必须将跌倒恐惧和功能独立性作为核心，而不仅仅是骨折愈合。
items.titleZh: 骨质疏松合并近期上肢脆性骨折老年患者对跌倒风险和跌倒恐惧的看法与需求
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了骨质疏松合并上肢脆性骨折老年患者的视角，重点关注他们的健康问题、跌倒和跌倒恐惧对日常生活的影响以及对康复的看法。
items.curatedReasonEn: Don't just focus on the fracture. This qualitative study highlights that older adults with osteoporosis and upper extremity fragility fractures are most concerned about recurrent falls and subsequent functional loss. In rehabilitation, you must prioritize fall fear and functional independence, not just fracture healing.
items.limitation: 这是一项定性研究，样本量较小，结果的普适性可能有限，更侧重于深度理解而非普遍性推断。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size, so the generalizability of the results may be limited, focusing more on in-depth understanding rather than broad generalization.

items.title: Effects of Dynamic Taping on Dynamic Balance and Proprioception in Recreational Athletes with Chronic Ankle Instability.
items.summary: A single-blind randomized controlled trial (n=28) compared the immediate effects of Dynamic Taping (DT) and Sports Taping (ST) on dynamic balance and proprioception in recreational athletes with chronic ankle instability, finding both similarly effective.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 显示，在慢性踝关节不稳的娱乐性运动员中，动态贴扎（DT）与运动贴扎（ST）相比，在改善动态平衡和本体感觉方面具有相似的即时效果。这提示你在临床实践中，可将 DT 作为 ST 的替代或补充手段，为患者提供支持而不限制功能性运动。
items.titleZh: 动态贴扎对慢性踝关节不稳娱乐性运动员动态平衡和本体感觉的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项单盲随机对照试验（n=28）比较了动态贴扎（DT）和运动贴扎（ST）对慢性踝关节不稳娱乐性运动员动态平衡和本体感觉的即时效果，发现两者效果相似。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT showed that dynamic taping (DT) has similar immediate effects to sports taping (ST) in improving dynamic balance and proprioception in recreational athletes with chronic ankle instability. This suggests that in clinical practice, you can use DT as an alternative or supplement to ST, providing support without restricting functional movement.
items.limitation: 研究仅评估了即时效果，未能提供两种贴扎方式的长期效果比较。
items.limitationEn: The study only evaluated immediate effects and did not provide a comparison of the long-term effects of the two taping methods.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Biomechanical effects of Kinesio versus Mulligan ankle taping on balance and ankle function in chronic STROKE: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (n=33 chronic stroke patients) compared the effects of Kinesio taping with treadmill training, Mulligan taping with treadmill training, and treadmill training alone, finding significant group differences in ankle dorsiflexion passive range of motion, balance, ankle stability, and fall efficacy after six weeks.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 表明，Kinesio 贴扎或 Mulligan 贴扎结合跑步机训练，在改善慢性卒中患者踝关节功能、平衡和跌倒效能感方面优于单独跑步机训练。在你的神经康复实践中，可以考虑将贴扎技术整合到步态和平衡训练中，以增强患者的康复效果。
items.titleZh: Kinesio 贴扎与 Mulligan 踝关节贴扎对慢性卒中患者平衡和踝关节生物力学功能的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（n=33 名慢性卒中患者）比较了 Kinesio 贴扎结合跑步机训练、Mulligan 贴扎结合跑步机训练以及单独跑步机训练的效果，发现在 6 周后，踝关节背屈被动活动度、平衡、踝关节稳定性和跌倒效能感方面存在显著组间差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT indicates that Kinesio taping or Mulligan taping combined with treadmill training improves ankle function, balance, and fall efficacy in chronic stroke patients better than treadmill training alone. In your neurorehabilitation practice, consider integrating taping techniques into gait and balance training to enhance patient outcomes.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小（33名患者），可能限制了结果的统计效力和普适性。
items.limitationEn: The study has a relatively small sample size (33 patients), which may limit the statistical power and generalizability of the results.

items.title: Validity and reliability of on‑site and off‑site direct observation of procedural skills (DOPS) for knee mobilization in Physical therapy education.
items.summary: This study validated the Direct Observation of Procedural Skills (DOPSknee) tool for knee joint mobilization in physical therapy education, demonstrating good on-site inter-rater reliability and acceptable validity for both on-site and off-site conditions among 42 preclinical PT students.
items.curatedReason: DOPSknee 工具的验证，尤其是支持远程评估，对于物理治疗教育的临床实践能力评估具有重要意义。这提示你可以在未来的教学或督导中探索远程评估工具的潜力，以提高效率和可及性。
items.titleZh: 膝关节松动术直接操作技能观察（DOPS）工具在物理治疗教育中现场和非现场评估的有效性和可靠性
items.summaryZh: 一项研究验证了膝关节松动术直接操作技能观察（DOPSknee）工具在物理治疗教育中的有效性和可靠性，发现其在 42 名临床前物理治疗学生中，现场评估的观察者间信度良好，且在现场和非现场条件下均表现出可接受的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: The validation of the DOPSknee tool, especially its support for off-site assessment, is significant for evaluating clinical competency in physical therapy education. This suggests you can explore the potential of remote assessment tools in future teaching or supervision to improve efficiency and accessibility.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小（42名学生），且仅限于膝关节松动术的评估。
items.limitationEn: The study sample size is relatively small (42 students) and limited to knee joint mobilization assessment.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: TRAK MSK: a randomised external feasibility trial and process evaluation of a digital physiotherapy supported self-management programme for people with musculoskeletal pain.
items.summary: A two-arm multi-site randomized external feasibility trial of TRAK MSK, a digital physiotherapy-supported self-management program for musculoskeletal pain, found it feasible for future definitive trials by comparing it to usual NHS physiotherapy care over 16 weeks.
items.curatedReason: TRAK MSK 项目的初步可行性试验表明，数字支持的自我管理项目在肌肉骨骼疼痛患者中是可行的。这为你设计和推广数字康复方案提供了初步证据，未来可考虑将这类项目整合到日常实践中。
items.titleZh: TRAK MSK：一项针对肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的数字物理治疗支持自我管理项目的随机外部可行性试验和过程评估
items.summaryZh: 一项两臂多中心随机外部可行性试验和过程评估显示，TRAK MSK（一项数字物理治疗支持的肌肉骨骼疼痛自我管理项目）在为期 16 周的干预中，与常规 NHS 物理治疗相比具有可行性，为未来开展明确试验提供了依据。
items.curatedReasonEn: The preliminary feasibility trial of the TRAK MSK program suggests that digital physiotherapy-supported self-management is feasible for people with musculoskeletal pain. This provides initial evidence for designing and promoting digital rehabilitation solutions, and you may consider integrating such programs into your daily practice in the future.
items.limitation: 这是一项可行性试验，旨在评估实施难度而非直接评估干预效果，样本量和随访时间有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a feasibility trial, aiming to assess implementation difficulty rather than direct intervention effectiveness, with limited sample size and follow-up duration.

items.title: Major discrepancies in recommendations regarding long-term activity restrictions following knee replacement: a survey among Swedish physiotherapists.
items.summary: A survey among Swedish physiotherapists revealed major discrepancies in recommendations for long-term activity restrictions following knee replacement surgery, highlighting a lack of consensus in clinical guidance.
items.curatedReason: 膝关节置换术后长期活动限制的建议存在显著差异。这提醒你在为患者提供指导时，要认识到行业内共识的缺乏，并关注个体化需求。同时，这也凸显了未来临床实践指南在此领域制定统一标准的必要性。
items.titleZh: 膝关节置换术后长期活动限制建议的重大差异：一项针对瑞典物理治疗师的调查
items.summaryZh: 一项针对瑞典物理治疗师的调查发现，膝关节置换术后长期活动限制的建议存在重大差异，凸显了临床指导中缺乏共识。
items.curatedReasonEn: There are significant discrepancies in recommendations for long-term activity restrictions after knee replacement. This highlights the lack of industry consensus, reminding you to focus on individualized needs when guiding patients. It also underscores the necessity for future clinical practice guidelines to establish unified standards in this area.
items.limitation: 研究基于瑞典物理治疗师的自我报告调查，可能存在回忆偏倚和样本代表性局限。
items.limitationEn: The study relies on self-reported surveys from Swedish physiotherapists, which may introduce recall bias and limitations in sample representativeness.

items.title: Adapting the MSK-HQ for paediatric musculoskeletal care: Insights from a national survey and focus group of physiotherapists.
items.summary: A national survey and focus group of 55 UK pediatric clinicians (54 physiotherapists, 1 podiatrist) explored views on adapting the Musculoskeletal Health Questionnaire (MSK-HQ) for use in pediatric musculoskeletal care.
items.curatedReason: 将 MSK-HQ 问卷改编用于儿科肌肉骨骼护理的调查，显示了临床医生对此的需求和可行性。如果你治疗儿科患者，可以关注这类工具的开发和验证，以更好地评估儿童和青少年的肌肉骨骼健康状况。
items.titleZh: 改编 MSK-HQ 用于儿科肌肉骨骼护理：来自全国调查和物理治疗师焦点小组的见解
items.summaryZh: 一项针对英国 55 名儿科临床医生（54 名物理治疗师，1 名足病医生）的全国调查和焦点小组探讨了将肌肉骨骼健康问卷（MSK-HQ）改编用于儿科肌肉骨骼护理的看法。
items.curatedReasonEn: The survey on adapting the MSK-HQ questionnaire for pediatric musculoskeletal care showed clinicians' need and feasibility for it. If you treat pediatric patients, you can pay attention to the development and validation of such tools to better assess the musculoskeletal health status of children and adolescents.
items.limitation: 研究主要基于英国临床医生的观点，可能不完全代表全球其他地区的实践和需求。
items.limitationEn: The study is primarily based on the views of UK clinicians, which may not fully represent practices and needs in other global regions.

items.title: Early-Stage Symptomatic Hip Osteoarthritis: A Window of Opportunity.
items.summary: This perspective article highlights the growing prevalence of hip osteoarthritis in young adults and emphasizes the importance of identifying and effectively treating early-stage symptomatic hip OA as a critical window of opportunity to slow or change its trajectory.
items.curatedReason: 早期诊断和干预症状性髋骨关节炎对改变疾病进程至关重要。这强调了在老年髋关节疼痛患者中，你需要提高对早期症状的识别能力，并及时启动干预，以延缓疾病进展。
items.titleZh: 早期症状性髋骨关节炎：一个机遇窗口
items.summaryZh: 这篇视角文章强调了髋骨关节炎在年轻成人中日益增长的患病率，并强调了识别和有效治疗早期症状性髋骨关节炎作为延缓或改变其病程的关键机遇窗口的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Early diagnosis and intervention for symptomatic hip osteoarthritis are crucial for altering the disease trajectory. This emphasizes that you need to improve your ability to identify early symptoms in older patients with hip pain and initiate interventions promptly to slow disease progression.
items.limitation: 这是一篇述评文章，主要基于现有文献和专家观点，不包含新的研究数据，证据等级低于系统综述或 RCT。
items.limitationEn: This is a commentary article, primarily based on existing literature and expert opinions, and does not contain new research data. The evidence level is lower than systematic reviews or RCTs.
items.journal: The Journal of orthopaedic and sports physical therapy

items.title: Pelvic floor muscle training for pelvic organ prolapse: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials found pelvic floor muscle training to be effective for pelvic organ prolapse.
items.curatedReason: 盆底肌训练（PFMT）对盆腔器官脱垂（POP）有效，这一点被这项系统综述和荟萃分析再次确认。你可以放心地将 PFMT 作为 POP 患者的一线保守治疗方案，并以此教育患者，支持其依从性。
items.titleZh: 盆底肌训练治疗盆腔器官脱垂：一项随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析发现，盆底肌训练对盆腔器官脱垂有效。
items.curatedReasonEn: Pelvic Floor Muscle Training (PFMT) is effective for Pelvic Organ Prolapse (POP), as confirmed by this systematic review and meta-analysis. You can confidently recommend PFMT as a first-line conservative treatment for POP patients and use this evidence for patient education to support adherence.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的异质性可能对综合效应量的精确性产生影响。
items.limitationEn: Heterogeneity among included studies may affect the precision of pooled effect sizes.

items.title: APTA Report Finds Demand for Pelvic Health Physical Therapy Outpaces Access
items.summary: A new APTA report, "APTA State of Pelvic Health Physical Therapy," reveals that demand for pelvic health physical therapy in the U.S. significantly outpaces access, highlighting workforce, access, and awareness challenges.
items.curatedReason: APTA 报告指出美国盆底物理治疗的需求远超可及性。这份报告揭示了劳动力、可及性和公众认知方面的关键挑战，你需要关注这些趋势，这可能直接影响你的执业范围、报销政策，以及如何与同行和决策者合作，共同扩大服务供给。
items.titleZh: APTA 报告发现美国盆底物理治疗需求超出可及性
items.summaryZh: 一份新的 APTA 报告《APTA 盆底物理治疗现状》显示，美国对盆底物理治疗的需求显著超出其可及性，凸显了劳动力、可及性和意识方面的挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: An APTA report indicates that demand for pelvic health physical therapy in the U.S. far outstrips access. This report highlights key challenges in workforce, access, and public awareness. You need to pay attention to these trends, as they could directly impact your scope of practice, reimbursement policies, and how you collaborate with peers and policymakers to expand service delivery.

items.title: Effectiveness of non-pharmacological interventions for lower limb motor impairment in post-stroke hemiplegia: a systematic review and Bayesian network meta-analysis | Journal of NeuroEngineering and Rehabilitation
items.summary: A systematic review and Bayesian network meta-analysis assessed the effectiveness of non-pharmacological interventions for lower limb motor impairment in post-stroke hemiplegia.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和贝叶斯网络荟萃分析评估了卒中后偏瘫下肢运动障碍的非药物干预措施有效性。其结果为你提供了不同非药物干预手段的相对疗效比较，你可以以此为依据，更精准地为卒中患者选择最佳康复策略。
items.titleZh: 非药物干预措施对卒中后偏瘫下肢运动障碍的有效性：一项系统综述和贝叶斯网络荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和贝叶斯网络荟萃分析评估了非药物干预措施对卒中后偏瘫下肢运动障碍的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and Bayesian network meta-analysis offers a clear comparison of non-pharmacological interventions for lower limb motor impairment in post-stroke hemiplegia. When selecting rehabilitation strategies, you can use this evidence to prioritize more effective non-pharmacological interventions, optimizing patient recovery pathways.
items.limitation: 贝叶斯网络荟萃分析的假设条件可能影响结果的稳健性，且纳入研究间的异质性需谨慎解读。
items.limitationEn: Assumptions of Bayesian network meta-analysis may affect result robustness, and heterogeneity among included studies requires cautious interpretation.

items.title: Effects of exercise on physical function and pain in adults with rheumatoid arthritis: an exit meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials
items.summary: An exit meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials found moderate certainty evidence that exercise, compared to no exercise, improved physical function and pain in adults with rheumatoid arthritis.
items.curatedReason: 这项荟萃分析确认了运动对类风湿关节炎（RA）患者身体功能和疼痛的益处，达到了中等证据水平。你可以更有信心地将运动疗法推荐给 RA 患者，作为常规治疗方案的重要组成部分。
items.titleZh: 运动对类风湿关节炎成人身体功能和疼痛的影响：一项随机对照试验的退出荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验的退出荟萃分析发现，与不运动相比，运动能中等程度地改善类风湿关节炎成人的身体功能和疼痛。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-analysis confirms the benefits of exercise for physical function and pain in rheumatoid arthritis (RA) patients, reaching a moderate level of evidence. You can more confidently recommend exercise therapy to RA patients as a crucial component of their regular treatment regimen.
items.limitation: 荟萃分析中纳入研究的异质性可能影响了结果的统一性。
items.limitationEn: Heterogeneity among included studies in the meta-analysis may impact the uniformity of results.

items.title: This systematic review and meta-analysis examined the impact of postpartum exercise on pelvic floor disorders…
items.summary: This systematic review and meta-analysis examined the impact of postpartum exercise on pelvic floor disorders and diastasis recti abdominis.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析评估了产后运动对盆底功能障碍和腹直肌分离的影响。其结果为产后康复提供了重要的证据支持，指导你制定基于证据的产后运动干预方案。
items.titleZh: 产后运动对盆底功能障碍和腹直肌分离的影响：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 本系统综述和荟萃分析评估了产后运动对盆底功能障碍和腹直肌分离的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis evaluated the impact of postpartum exercise on pelvic floor disorders and diastasis recti abdominis. Its findings provide crucial evidence to guide your development of evidence-based postpartum exercise interventions.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的方法学质量参差不齐，可能影响综合结果的可靠性。
items.limitationEn: The varied methodological quality of included studies might affect the reliability of pooled results.

items.title: Immediate Weight-Bearing and Early Ambulation Rehabilitation After Femoral Neck System Fixation for Undisplaced Femoral Neck Fractures: A Prospective Randomized Controlled Trial
items.summary: This prospective randomized controlled trial investigated immediate weight-bearing and early ambulation rehabilitation after femoral neck system fixation for undisplaced femoral neck fractures.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 证明，对于股骨颈系统内固定治疗的移位性股骨颈骨折患者，早期负重和早期活动康复是安全有效的。你可以依据此证据，在符合患者情况的前提下，更积极地推动此类患者的早期康复进程，以期获得更好的功能恢复。
items.titleZh: 股骨颈系统内固定治疗未移位股骨颈骨折后即刻负重和早期活动康复：一项前瞻性随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性随机对照试验研究了股骨颈系统内固定治疗未移位股骨颈骨折后即刻负重和早期活动康复的疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT demonstrates that immediate weight-bearing and early ambulation rehabilitation are safe and effective for patients with undisplaced femoral neck fractures treated with femoral neck system fixation. Based on this evidence, you can more actively promote early rehabilitation for such patients, where appropriate, to achieve better functional recovery.
items.limitation: 研究仅针对移位性股骨颈骨折，结果可能不适用于其他类型股骨颈骨折。
items.limitationEn: The study focused only on undisplaced femoral neck fractures, so results may not apply to other types.

items.title: Frailty assessment and effect of physical activity interventions in older adults: a scoping review, meta-analysis, and meta-regression
items.summary: A scoping review, meta-analysis, and meta-regression assessed frailty assessment and the effect of physical activity interventions in older adults.
items.curatedReason: 老年人衰弱评估和体力活动干预的效果是明确的。这项系统综述和荟萃分析强调了体力活动在对抗老年衰弱中的关键作用，因此你应积极在老年康复中推行个性化的体力活动计划，并利用有效的评估工具识别高危人群。
items.titleZh: 老年人衰弱评估和体力活动干预效果：一项范围综述、荟萃分析和荟萃回归
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述、荟萃分析和荟萃回归评估了老年人衰弱评估和体力活动干预的效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: The effects of frailty assessment and physical activity interventions in older adults are clear. This systematic review and meta-analysis highlights the critical role of physical activity in combating geriatric frailty. Therefore, you should actively promote personalized physical activity plans in geriatric rehabilitation and use effective assessment tools to identify at-risk populations.
items.limitation: 纳入研究在衰弱定义和评估方法上的异质性可能影响荟萃分析结果的解释。
items.limitationEn: Heterogeneity in frailty definitions and assessment methods among included studies may affect the interpretation of meta-analysis results.

items.title: Effect of pain neuroscience education on pain, kinesiophobia, disability, and quality of life in patients with frozen shoulder: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: This randomized controlled trial investigated the effect of pain neuroscience education on pain, kinesiophobia, disability, and quality of life in patients with frozen shoulder.
items.curatedReason: 这篇 RCT 提示疼痛神经科学教育（PNE）对冻结肩患者的疼痛、运动恐惧症、功能障碍和生活质量有积极影响。虽然是单中心小样本研究，但它为 PNE 在冻结肩康复中的应用提供了初步支持。
items.titleZh: 疼痛神经科学教育对冻结肩患者疼痛、运动恐惧症、功能障碍和生活质量的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验旨在评估疼痛神经科学教育对冻结肩患者的疼痛、运动恐惧症、功能障碍和生活质量的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that Pain Neuroscience Education (PNE) positively impacts pain, kinesiophobia, disability, and quality of life in patients with frozen shoulder. Although a single-center study with a small sample, it provides initial support for PNE's application in frozen shoulder rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 这是一项单中心随机对照试验，可能限制了结果的外推性。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-center randomized controlled trial, which may limit the generalizability of the results.

items.title: Effects of OsteoStrong vs. dynamic multicomponent exercise on physical function in older women in the BONEMORE randomized controlled trial
items.summary: The BONEMORE randomized controlled trial examined the effects of OsteoStrong versus dynamic multicomponent exercise on physical function in older women.
items.curatedReason: BONEMORE 随机对照试验探讨了 OsteoStrong 与多成分动态运动对老年女性身体功能的影响。对于关注老年人骨骼健康和功能改善的临床医师，这项研究提供了关于不同运动干预效果的比较数据。
items.titleZh: OsteoStrong 与多成分动态运动对老年女性身体功能的影响：BONEMORE 随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: BONEMORE 随机对照试验评估了 OsteoStrong 与多成分动态运动对老年女性身体功能的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: The BONEMORE randomized controlled trial explores the effects of OsteoStrong versus dynamic multicomponent exercise on physical function in older women. For clinicians focused on bone health and functional improvement in older adults, this study provides comparative data on different exercise interventions.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅限于老年女性，结果可能不适用于其他人群。
items.limitationEn: The study population was limited to older women, and the results may not be generalizable to other populations.

items.title: A Multicenter Randomized Pragmatic Trial Comparing Intra-Articular Injection, Genicular Nerve Block, and Radiofrequency Ablation for Knee Osteoarthritis Pain: SKOAP Phase 2 Protocol
items.summary: The SKOAP Phase 2 protocol describes a multicenter randomized pragmatic trial comparing intra-articular injection, genicular nerve block, and radiofrequency ablation for knee osteoarthritis pain when conservative management fails.
items.curatedReason: 这是一个多中心、随机、实用性试验的方案。你目前不应改变膝骨关节炎疼痛的治疗策略，但请关注其结果，因为它有望提供关于关节内注射、膝关节神经阻滞和射频消融三者头对头比较的高级别证据。
items.titleZh: 膝骨关节炎疼痛的关节内注射、膝关节神经阻滞和射频消融比较：SKOAP 2 期协议多中心随机实用试验
items.summaryZh: SKOAP 2 期协议描述了一项多中心随机实用试验，旨在比较保守治疗失败后，关节内注射、膝关节神经阻滞和射频消融治疗膝骨关节炎疼痛的疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a protocol for a multicenter, randomized, pragmatic trial. You should not change your current treatment strategies for knee osteoarthritis pain, but monitor its results. It promises high-level, head-to-head comparative evidence on intra-articular injection, genicular nerve block, and radiofrequency ablation.

items.title: Biokinetic insights into the hip–spine relationship: no correlation between hip strength or flexibility and altered pelvic motion in patients with low back pain
items.summary: This biokinetic study found no correlation between hip strength or flexibility and altered pelvic motion in patients with low back pain.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究发现髋关节力量或柔韧性与腰痛患者骨盆运动改变之间没有相关性。这意味着你可能需要重新审视“髋-脊柱关系”的某些传统观念，并更精准地评估腰痛患者的生物力学。
items.titleZh: 髋-脊柱关系的生物运动学洞察：腰痛患者的髋关节力量、柔韧性与骨盆运动改变无相关性
items.summaryZh: 这项生物运动学研究发现，在腰痛患者中，髋关节力量或柔韧性与骨盆运动改变之间没有相关性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found no correlation between hip strength or flexibility and altered pelvic motion in patients with low back pain. This suggests you may need to re-evaluate some traditional concepts of the "hip-spine relationship" and more precisely assess biomechanics in patients with low back pain.
items.limitation: 研究为横断面设计，无法建立因果关系，且样本量可能不足以检测细微关联。
items.limitationEn: The study's cross-sectional design prevents causal inference, and the sample size may be insufficient to detect subtle associations.

items.title: Efficacy and safety of immersive, sEMG-triggered virtual reality game training for post-stroke dysphagia: a randomized, single-blind, controlled trial
items.summary: This randomized, single-blind, controlled trial investigated the efficacy and safety of immersive, sEMG-triggered virtual reality game training for post-stroke dysphagia.
items.curatedReason: 卒中后吞咽困难可尝试沉浸式 sEMG 触发虚拟现实游戏训练。这项 RCT 提示，VR 技术在改善吞咽功能方面具有潜力和安全性，你可以考虑在神经康复中探索性地应用，但需留意其小样本量（n=38）。
items.titleZh: 沉浸式 sEMG 触发虚拟现实游戏训练对卒中后吞咽困难的疗效和安全性：一项随机、单盲、对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机、单盲、对照试验研究了沉浸式 sEMG 触发虚拟现实游戏训练对卒中后吞咽困难的疗效和安全性。
items.curatedReasonEn: For post-stroke dysphagia, immersive sEMG-triggered virtual reality game training can be considered. This RCT suggests VR technology has potential and safety in improving swallowing function. You might explore its application in neurorehabilitation, but be mindful of its small sample size (n=38).
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小，且为单盲试验，可能存在一定的偏倚。
items.limitationEn: The study had a relatively small sample size and was single-blind, which might introduce some bias.

items.title: Risk and protective factors for musculoskeletal injury in youth track and field: a methodological scoping review | BMC Sports Science, Medicine and Rehabilitation
items.summary: This methodological scoping review investigated risk and protective factors for musculoskeletal injury in youth track and field athletes.
items.curatedReason: 青少年田径运动员的肌肉骨骼损伤预防，本综述梳理了现有研究的风险和保护因素。你在设计预防方案时，应考虑这些已知的因素，并关注研究方法学上的挑战，以制定更严谨的策略。
items.titleZh: 青少年田径运动员肌肉骨骼损伤的风险和保护因素：一项方法学范围综述
items.summaryZh: 这项方法学范围综述调查了青少年田径运动员肌肉骨骼损伤的风险和保护因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: For musculoskeletal injury prevention in youth track and field athletes, this review outlines existing research on risk and protective factors. When designing prevention programs, you should consider these known factors and be aware of methodological challenges in research to develop more robust strategies.
items.limitation: 范围综述的性质决定其主要为信息整合，不提供新的临床干预效果证据。
items.limitationEn: The nature of a scoping review means it primarily integrates information and does not provide new evidence on clinical intervention efficacy.

items.title: Pelvic Floor Knowledge and Dysfunctions in Female Athletes: Impact of Demographics, Sport Profile, and Physical Activity - International Urogynecology Journal
items.summary: This study investigated pelvic floor knowledge and dysfunctions in female athletes and the impact of demographics, sport profile, and physical activity.
items.curatedReason: 这项观察研究提示，女性运动员的盆底知识不足且功能障碍普遍。你应当在评估高强度运动女性运动员时，主动筛查盆底健康并加强相关宣教，帮助她们预防潜在问题。
items.titleZh: 女性运动员的盆底知识与功能障碍：人口统计学、运动特征和体力活动的影响
items.summaryZh: 本研究调查了女性运动员的盆底知识和功能障碍，以及人口统计学、运动特征和体力活动对其的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study suggests that female athletes often lack pelvic floor knowledge and frequently experience dysfunctions. You should proactively screen for pelvic floor health and enhance education for female athletes in high-impact sports, helping them prevent potential issues.
items.limitation: 研究为横断面设计，无法确定因果关系。
items.limitationEn: The study's cross-sectional design prevents establishing causality.

items.title: Clinical and functional outcomes of upper extremity 3D-printed immobilization devices compared to traditional methods: a systematic review with limited meta-analysis | Journal of Orthopaedic Surgery and Research
items.summary: A systematic review with limited meta-analysis compared the clinical and functional outcomes of upper extremity 3D-printed immobilization devices to traditional methods.
items.curatedReason: 3D 打印固定装置在上肢骨折康复中，临床和功能结果与传统方法相当。这提示你，未来 3D 打印技术有望提供更个性化、可能更舒适的固定选择，值得你开始关注其成本与可及性，以便未来将其纳入实践。
items.titleZh: 上肢 3D 打印固定装置与传统方法在临床和功能结果上的比较：一项有限荟萃分析的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项包含有限荟萃分析的系统综述比较了上肢 3D 打印固定装置与传统方法在临床和功能结果上的差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: 3D-printed immobilization devices for upper extremity fractures show comparable clinical and functional outcomes to traditional methods. This suggests that 3D printing technology may offer more personalized and potentially comfortable immobilization options in the future. You should start monitoring its cost and accessibility for potential future integration into practice.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的数量和质量有限，可能影响结果的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: The limited number and quality of included studies may affect the generalizability of the results.

items.title: Wound complications and clinical efficacy of the direct anterior approach versus the posterolateral approach in total hip arthroplasty: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials compared wound complications and clinical efficacy of the direct anterior approach versus the posterolateral approach in total hip arthroplasty.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析比较了直接前路（DAA）和后外侧入路（PLA）全髋关节置换术的伤口并发症和临床疗效。它为你在术后康复中理解不同手术入路可能带来的预后差异提供了证据，你可以据此调整康复策略和患者教育。
items.titleZh: 直接前路与后外侧入路全髋关节置换术的伤口并发症和临床疗效：一项随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析比较了直接前路与后外侧入路全髋关节置换术的伤口并发症和临床疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis compared wound complications and clinical efficacy of direct anterior (DAA) versus posterolateral (PLA) approaches in total hip arthroplasty. It provides evidence for you to understand potential prognostic differences arising from various surgical approaches in postoperative rehabilitation, allowing you to adjust rehabilitation strategies and patient education accordingly.
items.limitation: 尽管是系统综述，但可能存在不同研究间方法学的异质性，影响结果的统一性。
items.limitationEn: Despite being a systematic review, methodological heterogeneity among studies may exist, affecting the uniformity of results.

items.title: Neurorobotics for Neurorehabilitation: Clinical Applications and Future Research Direction
items.summary: This review discusses clinical applications and future research directions of neurorobotics for neurorehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述探讨了神经康复中的神经机器人学临床应用和未来研究方向。对于关注前沿技术如何改变康复实践的你，这提供了一个全面的视角，有助于你了解该领域的发展趋势。
items.titleZh: 神经康复中的神经机器人学：临床应用与未来研究方向
items.summaryZh: 本综述探讨了神经康复中神经机器人学的临床应用和未来研究方向。
items.curatedReasonEn: Neurorobotics is a field to watch in neurorehabilitation. This review highlights how existing technologies can be clinically applied and where further research is needed to truly transform rehabilitation practice.
items.limitation: 综述性质决定其证据等级低于系统综述或 RCT，主要提供观点和方向性信息。
items.limitationEn: As a review, its evidence level is lower than systematic reviews or RCTs, primarily offering perspectives and directional information.

items.title: Rehabilitation in patients with primary brain tumors: a scoping review of current guideline recommendations
items.summary: This scoping review summarized current guideline recommendations for rehabilitation in patients with primary brain tumors.
items.curatedReason: 针对原发性脑肿瘤患者的康复，本综述指出了当前指南的局限性。在临床实践中，你应认识到现有证据的空白，并据此调整康复策略，而非盲目遵循不完善的指南。
items.titleZh: 原发性脑肿瘤患者康复：现有指南建议的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 本范围综述总结了原发性脑肿瘤患者康复的现有指南建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review points to limitations in current guidelines for primary brain tumor rehabilitation. Clinically, you should recognize the gaps in existing evidence and adjust your rehabilitation strategies accordingly, rather than blindly following incomplete recommendations.
items.limitation: 范围综述的性质决定其主要为信息整合，缺乏对证据质量的深入评估。
items.limitationEn: The nature of a scoping review means it primarily synthesizes information and lacks in-depth assessment of evidence quality.

items.title: Heterogeneity in symptom burden and supportive care needs among older adults with ischemic stroke: a cross-sectional study
items.summary: This cross-sectional study investigated the heterogeneity in symptom burden and supportive care needs among older adults with ischemic stroke.
items.curatedReason: 这项横断面研究揭示了老年缺血性卒中患者症状负担和支持性护理需求的异质性。它提醒你在评估和管理老年卒中患者时，需要采用更个体化的方法，充分考虑其症状的复杂性和多样性。
items.titleZh: 老年缺血性卒中患者症状负担和支持性护理需求的异质性：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面研究调查了老年缺血性卒中患者症状负担和支持性护理需求的异质性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study reveals heterogeneity in symptom burden and supportive care needs among older adults with ischemic stroke. It reminds you to adopt a more individualized approach when assessing and managing older stroke patients, fully considering the complexity and diversity of their symptoms.
items.limitation: 横断面研究设计无法建立症状负担与支持性护理需求之间的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: The cross-sectional study design prevents establishing causal relationships between symptom burden and supportive care needs.

items.title: Efficacy of Tuina in chronic low back pain with anxiety - BMJ Open
items.summary: This study protocol outlines a randomized controlled trial investigating the efficacy of Tuina for chronic low back pain with anxiety.
items.curatedReason: 这是一项关于推拿（Tuina）治疗伴焦虑的慢性腰痛的 RCT 方案。它的价值在于预示了未来可能出现一种整合传统疗法的新方案，但在结果发布前，你应继续采用现有循证方法，不需立即改变实践。
items.titleZh: 推拿治疗伴焦虑的慢性腰痛的疗效：一项随机对照试验研究方案
items.summaryZh: 本研究方案概述了一项随机对照试验，旨在探讨推拿治疗伴焦虑的慢性腰痛的疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is an RCT protocol for Tuina in chronic low back pain with anxiety. Its value lies in foreshadowing a potential new integrated traditional therapy. However, until results are published, you should continue with existing evidence-based approaches and not immediately change your practice.

items.title: Composite severity score for race-related incidents in cycling
items.summary: This paper proposes a new incident-level severity framework for surveillance in cycling, aiming to provide more comprehensive insights into race-related events beyond traditional injury incidence and diagnosis.
items.curatedReason: 本文提出了一套新的自行车赛事事故严重性评分框架。当你进行运动损伤监测时，可以考虑引入这类多维度指标，以更全面地评估和预防集体项目中的意外事件，而不仅仅关注个人层面的伤病诊断。
items.titleZh: 自行车赛事中与竞赛相关的事故综合严重性评分
items.summaryZh: 本文提出一个事故层面的严重性框架，用于自行车赛事监控，旨在更全面地评估竞赛中涉及多名骑手的碰撞、个人撞击或其他影响参与者安全的事件，突破传统伤病监测仅关注伤病发生率和诊断的局限。
items.curatedReasonEn: This paper proposes a new severity scoring framework for cycling race incidents. When conducting sports injury surveillance, consider incorporating such multidimensional indicators to more comprehensively assess and prevent incidents in mass-start sports, beyond just individual-level injury diagnoses.
items.limitation: 这是一个概念性框架，而非经过大规模验证的工具；其效用需在实际应用中进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a conceptual framework, not a widely validated tool; its utility requires further empirical validation in real-world applications.

items.title: Ready to respond? Safeguarding structures in European National Olympic Committees
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey of 20 European National Olympic Committees (NOCs) assessed safeguarding structures, revealing that while most NOCs appointed safeguarding officers, systemic gaps exist in policies, reporting mechanisms, and case management, impacting their readiness to respond to interpersonal violence.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对欧洲国家奥委会的调查显示，尽管大多数机构设立了保障官员，但在政策、报告机制和应对能力方面仍存在系统性不足。这提醒你，即使在规范化的体育组织中，保障运动员权益的结构性支持也可能存在薄弱环节，需要持续关注和改进。
items.titleZh: 准备好应对了吗？欧洲国家奥委会的保障结构
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 20 个欧洲国家奥委会的横断面调查评估了其保障结构和应对人际暴力的组织准备情况。结果显示，19 个奥委会设有保障官员，但普遍存在政策、报告机制和案件管理方面的系统性不足，影响了其应对能力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey of European National Olympic Committees reveals systemic gaps in policies, reporting mechanisms, and response capacity, despite most organizations having safeguarding officers. This indicates that even in regulated sports organizations, structural support for athlete protection may have weaknesses, requiring continuous attention and improvement.
items.limitation: 研究为横断面调查，仅反映了特定时间点的现状，无法评估保障结构的动态变化或干预效果。
items.limitationEn: The study is a cross-sectional survey, reflecting status at a specific time point and unable to assess dynamic changes or intervention effects of safeguarding structures.

items.title: Impact of heat exposure on muscle-tendon properties and mechanics (PhD Academy Award)
items.summary: This PhD work explored the responses of the neuromuscular and musculotendinous system in vivo under different heat stress conditions, focusing on the gastrocnemius medialis muscle-tendon unit to determine the effects of passive heat exposure, acute heat exposure during activity, and active heat acclimation on its properties and mechanics.
items.curatedReason: 这项博士研究揭示了热暴露对神经肌肉和肌肉-肌腱单位特性和力学的影响。如果你在高温环境下为运动员提供康复或训练指导，应将这些发现纳入考量，以优化方案并预防热应激相关损伤。
items.titleZh: 热暴露对肌肉-肌腱特性和力学的影响（博士学院奖）
items.summaryZh: 这项博士研究探讨了不同热应激条件下神经肌肉和肌肉-肌腱系统（主要针对腓肠肌内侧头）的体内反应，分析了被动热暴露、活动中急性热暴露以及主动热适应对其特性和力学的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This PhD research reveals the impact of heat exposure on neuromuscular and musculotendinous unit properties and mechanics. If you provide rehabilitation or training guidance for athletes in hot environments, you should consider these findings to optimize programs and prevent heat stress-related injuries.
items.limitation: 研究聚焦于特定肌肉群（腓肠肌内侧头），结果外推至其他肌肉群或复杂运动模式时需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study focused on a specific muscle group (medial gastrocnemius), and results should be applied cautiously when extrapolated to other muscle groups or complex movement patterns.

items.title: #Beyondthelikes: the influence of social media on athletes mental health
items.summary: This editorial explores the risks and opportunities of social media use for young athletes, highlighting its potential to both support and thwart basic psychological needs essential for optimal development and well-being.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论讨论了社交媒体对年轻运动员心理健康的双重影响。你应关注年轻运动员在数字环境中可能面临的心理挑战，并在康复过程中将社交媒体使用作为一个潜在影响因素进行考量。
items.titleZh: #Beyondthelikes：社交媒体对运动员心理健康的影响
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论探讨了社交媒体对年轻运动员心理健康的风险与机遇，指出数字空间可能同时支持或阻碍与幸福感相关的基本心理需求，并呼吁更多研究关注此领域。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial discusses the dual impact of social media on young athletes' mental health. You should be aware of the psychological challenges young athletes might face in digital environments and consider social media use as a potential influencing factor in their rehabilitation process.
items.limitation: 这是一篇社论，不包含原始研究数据，主要基于现有证据和专家观点进行论述。
items.limitationEn: This is an editorial and does not contain original research data, primarily discussing based on existing evidence and expert opinions.

items.title: Towards safer and smarter boxing: technology, health and performance
items.summary: This editorial discusses the need for technology, health, and performance integration in boxing to address issues like subjective judging, traumatic brain injury, and reliance on intuition over data, especially in light of recent athlete deaths.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论强调了在拳击运动中应用技术改善健康和表现的重要性。你作为康复师，需要意识到高风险运动项目对运动员长期健康带来的挑战，并关注技术如何辅助评估和干预，以降低创伤性脑损伤等风险。
items.titleZh: 迈向更安全、更智能的拳击：技术、健康与表现
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论讨论了拳击运动在主观裁判、高发脑外伤和依赖直觉训练方面面临的挑战，并强调了引入技术以更好地管理冲撞伤害，提升运动员健康与表现的必要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial emphasizes the importance of applying technology to improve health and performance in boxing. As a rehabilitation specialist, you need to be aware of the challenges high-risk sports pose to athletes' long-term health and pay attention to how technology can assist in assessment and intervention to reduce risks like traumatic brain injury.
items.limitation: 这是一篇社论，未提供具体的技术方案或实证研究数据，主要提出观点和未来方向。
items.limitationEn: This is an editorial, providing no specific technological solutions or empirical research data, primarily presenting opinions and future directions.

items.title: Infographic. Video analysis of muscle strains in sport: qualitative and quantitative situational characteristics across muscle groups
